name: exa-web-search-free
tagline: ClawHub (68★): Free AI search via Exa MCP. Web search for news/info, code search for docs/examples from GitHub/StackOverflow, company resea
verdict: Generally solid, with only the mcporter-not-configured failure path handled; if mcporter itself is missing or a tool call fails outright, the skill has nothing to say. Also missing: any 'not for' scope guidance and version tracking, minor next to core functionality.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' / out-of-scope / pointer-to-other-skill language appears anywhere in description or body.
No version field in frontmatter, no changelog section, no dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
Only the 'exa not configured in mcporter' failure path is handled; mcporter itself being absent/uninstalled, or an individual tool call failing, is never addressed.
